name: Peach Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, mix together all the topping ingredients.
3. Combine peaches and brown sugar in an 8-inch square baking pan.
4. Sprinkle topping evenly over the peaches.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes, until peaches are soft and topping is bubbly.
